title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Ashura Doji, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kinemon as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Someone knows I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why so long... Why twenty years?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: only the one who sent us can know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There must have been some reason!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no intention of doubting Lord Oden's aims...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, men! The time has come! Eight days from today, on the night of fire festival!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Under the Kozuki banner, we will raid onigashima

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And end the terror of the pirate Kaido and Shogun Crochi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If you've got the guts, join us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Of course, leader!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We've waited for this day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't let Lord Yasuie's death go to waste!

dialogue.speaker: Ashura Doji
dialogue.text: Ashura!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys are the same as you were that day, right, Kinemon?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once upon a time, we were the same age,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But now we're 20 years stronger than you lot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: right, inu?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: you bet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up, you old coats. You better not hold us back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, come off it. None of us can stop a fight

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Bet- When Red Sheaths!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: forests around the flower capital

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Curse you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Deep inside the forest Emma's temple

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hopefully that's all of them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sheesh, just how many troops are in this Ninja Army?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Slide

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm just in your way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah, you are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's okay, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you died on me, I dunno what I'd say to momonosuke.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: D'ya wanna go back to that house in the snow?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't mind where we are, as long as there is somewhere I can hide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My friends have her. She's safe. Can't say the same about her state of mind, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm more worried about O-TOO. I hope she's okay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: More importantly, I need to find that guy that took my sword.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 37 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
